config.title: Board Settings
config.badgeMappingHint: Map resolved badge states to board columns

issue.title: Title *
issue.cannotDeleteWhileWorking: Cannot delete while AI is working
issue.dropzone: Drag or click to attach images
issue.invalidFileType: Unsupported file type (PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP only)

workflow.validateOnlyApproveHint: After the user's requested fixes are complete, change the story status to Approved.
workflow.validateFixPrompt: Please fix all Critical Issues, Should-Fix Issues, and Nice-to-Have Issues identified in the validation results above.
workflow.approveAfterFixPrompt: If the story status is not Approved, please change it to Approved now.
workflow.resolveGateOutro: After completing QA fixes, update the gate YAML file's gate field to 'FIXED'.
workflow.quickFixOutro: When the fix is complete, update the issue status to 'Ready for Review'.

empty.message: No items on the board. Try adding an issue.

promote.issueFileRef: Read the full issue details from `{{file}}` before creating the story.
promote.issueFileRefEpic: Read the full issue details from `{{file}}` before creating the epic.
promote.docOutStoryChain:
*doc-out

IMPORTANT: The output file MUST be saved to `docs/stories/` with the filename prefix `BS-{{nextNum}}.` followed by a kebab-case slug. Example: `docs/stories/BS-{{nextNum}}.my-feature-name.story.md`
promote.docOutEpicChain:
*doc-out

IMPORTANT:
- The epic number is **Epic {{nextNum}}**. Use this number consistently throughout the document.
- The title MUST start with `# Epic {{nextNum}}: `
- Story headers MUST use the format `### Story {{nextNum}}.1: Title`, `### Story {{nextNum}}.2: Title`, etc.
- The output file MUST be saved to `docs/prd/epic-{{nextNum}}-` followed by a kebab-case slug. Example: `docs/prd/epic-{{nextNum}}-my-feature-name.md`
